name: Pre-Emergent + Post-Emergent
talk: Grass is dormant — ideal window for weed prevention. We're putting down a soil barrier to stop spring weeds before they sprout, and knocking out anything already up. No fertilizer this round — just weed control.
yard: Dormant, not actively growing. Customer should see fewer weeds emerging over the next several weeks.

name: Pre-Emergent + Post-Emergent
talk: Still dormant or just waking up. We're reinforcing the pre-emergent barrier with a second chemistry (rotation prevents resistance) and targeting any grassy weeds that broke through round 1.
yard: Dormant to early green-up. Significantly fewer weeds breaking through.

name: Fertilizer + Spot Treat
talk: The grass is coming out of dormancy and greening up. This is a high-quality slow-release fertilizer to fuel that growth. We'll spot-treat any broadleaf weeds or nutsedge we see.
yard: Coming out of dormancy, greening up. Deeper green color, thicker turf, stronger growth.

name: Fertilizer + Spot Treat
talk: Full green-up, actively growing. Another round of controlled-release fertilizer for density and color. Spot-treating any summer weeds with Celsius, which is specifically designed for warm-season turf.
yard: Actively growing, full green-up. Thicker, greener, healthier.

name: Fertilizer + Post-Emergent
talk: Peak growing season. Liquid fertilizer with kelp for nutrition plus active weed control. Targeting any nutsedge that's popped up in the heat.
yard: Actively growing, full green-up. Continued density and color improvement.

name: Fall Pre-Emergent
talk: Growth is slowing. We're laying a pre-emergent barrier for winter and spring weeds, plus potassium to help the grass harden off for dormancy. Think of it as winterizing the lawn.
yard: Slowing growth. Prevention of winter/spring weeds begins.

name: Post-Emergent (Winter Cleanup)
talk: Grass is fully dormant. We're cleaning up cool-season weeds so the lawn looks clean and the barrier is reinforced going into winter. Sets up a strong start in spring.
yard: Fully dormant. Fewer winter weeds, cleaner dormant lawn.
